```json
[
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_01",
    "title": "Positive Test: UE-Initiated Detach Request sent to MME with Switch Off = true",
    "description": "Verify that when the UE sends a Detach Request NAS message with Switch Off parameter set to true while camping on E-UTRAN, the MME processes the request and releases resources accordingly.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on E-UTRAN",
      "UE is in ECM-IDLE or ECM-CONNECTED state",
      "UE has an active PDN connection"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger UE to send NAS Detach Request message with parameters: GUTI and Switch Off = true",
      "eNodeB forwards the Detach Request NAS message with TAI+ECGI to the MME",
      "Verify that MME establishes S1 connection if UE was in ECM-IDLE",
      "Verify that MME sends Delete Session Request messages to Serving GW per PDN connection with appropriate parameters including LBI, User Location Information, Secondary RAT usage data, and PSCell ID if Dual Connectivity is active",
      "Verify Serving GW processes Delete Session Request and sends Delete Session Request to PDN GW",
      "Verify PDN GW responds with Delete Session Response and initiates IP-CAN Session Termination if PCRF is configured",
      "Verify Serving GW sends Delete Session Response to MME",
      "Verify MME sends S1 Release Command to eNodeB with Cause set to Detach",
      "Verify eNodeB releases S1 resources and sends S1 UE Context Release Complete message to MME",
      "Verify UE transitions to ECM-IDLE state"
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME successfully processes Detach Request with Switch Off = true",
      "All bearers and PDN connections are released correctly",
      "S1 signalling connection between UE and network is released",
      "No Detach Accept message is sent to UE as Switch Off indicates UE powered off"
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor NAS messages between UE and MME",
      "Check MME logs for Delete Session Request/Response messages",
      "Validate S1 Release Command and Release Complete messages",
      "UE state transition verification"
    ]
  },
